title: Twilight Forest - Aurora Palace Regeared
description: Revamps the Twilight Forest's Aurora Palace with a new build by Gearsaw Studios!
body:
## Description

The Twilight Forest's Aurora Palace uses some pretty blocks, but the structure itself hasn't kept up with modern Minecraft. The Twilight Forest developers know this and are planning on reworking it, but why wait? This regeared Aurora Palace can be dropped into your Twilight Forest adventure to breathe new life into this part of the mod! This enormous revamp aims to make the Aurora Palace a high point of the Twilight Forest, both in aesthetics and gameplay. Even once you clear it, the numerous room variants will give you something new to look forward to for the next time! Take a look at the image gallery to see some of what awaits!

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/928/852/1.png)

This structure was primarily made by Gearsaw Studios. [Please check out his channel](https://www.youtube.com/@GearsawStudios); he's an excellent builder.
